---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement for workflow, scripts, agents, or templates
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed change.

## Scope

- [ ] Scripts (`scripts/*`)
- [ ] Agents (`.github/agents/*`)
- [ ] Templates (`.lesson/templates/*`)
- [ ] Documentation

## Workflow Impact

How does this affect the chat-first flow (`course-planner -> discussion-moderator -> lesson-planner -> slides-maker`)?

## Acceptance Criteria

List clear conditions to consider this done.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe alternatives and trade-offs.

## Additional Context

Any examples, mockups, or references.
